The paper exists and the GitHub BibTeX citation confirms both authors: **Jin-Hwi Park and Hae-Gon Jeon**, exactly matching the cited reference. The automated checker's "first author mismatch" flag appears to be erroneous — the real paper does list Jin-Hwi Park as first author and Hae-Gon Jeon as second, which matches the citation.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
